$schema: Reviewed, intentional bare strings excluded from `audit --unwrapped`. Each entry: { text, file?, reason }. `file` is a repo-relative path suffix; omit it to suppress the text everywhere. Keep `reason` filled so reviewers know why a string is intentionally not wrapped in t().

entries.reason: Google Picker SDK PickerBuilder().setTitle() — rendered by Google's hosted iframe, not an app surface; cannot use app t().
